author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
The Division 2: Into the Dark Season - Dev Diary
Tom Clancy's The Division 2's new season, ""Into the Dark"" is coming on June 16.

The Hyenas are back, stronger and more dangerous, spreading chaos across D.C. As reports of missing civilians rise, Agents must step into the Dark Zone to uncover the truth and put an end to their operations.

This season puts the Dark Zone front and center with a revamped ecosystem, including PvP balancing updates, new rule sets, and the addition of a new PvE Dark Zone experience, where powerful enemies and Toxicity mechanics push survival to the limit.

Enhance your builds with seasonal modifiers and unlock powerful bonuses as you play to take on the Hyenas threat. Upgrade your arsenal with new weapons and gear, and tackle two new Classified Assignments - all available through the Season Pass. More content is coming throughout the season, so stay tuned for future updates!

About The Division 2:
Tom Clancy's The Division 2 is a shooter RPG with a thrilling campaign fully playable in co-op and multiple PVP modes.

In The Division 2, save your country in Washington, DC, and in the Warlords of New York expansion, hunt down Aaron Keener, a former Agent who has taken control of New York.

#Ubisoft #TheDivision2

About Ubisoft:
Ubisoft is a creator of worlds, committed to enriching players’ lives with original and memorable entertainment experiences. Ubisoft’s global teams create and develop a deep and diverse portfolio of games, featuring brands such as Assassin’s Creed®, Brawlhalla®, For Honor®, Far Cry®, Tom Clancy’s Ghost Recon®, Just Dance®, Rabbids®, Tom Clancy’s Rainbow Six®, The Crew® and Tom Clancy’s The Division®. Through Ubisoft Connect, players can enjoy an ecosystem of services to enhance their gaming experience, get rewards and connect with friends across platforms. With Ubisoft+, the subscription service, they can access a growing catalog of more than 100 Ubisoft games and DLC. For the 2023-24 fiscal year, Ubisoft generated net bookings of €2.32 billion. To learn more, please visit: www.ubisoftgroup.com.

© 2024 Ubisoft Entertainment. All Rights Reserved. Ubisoft and the Ubisoft logo are registered trademarks in the US and/or other countries.

author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
The Division 2: Into the Dark - Official Launch Trailer
Agents, it's time to venture into the dark.
 
This season, Hyenas flood the streets with a stronger, new supply of Spice, and Agents must go into the Dark Zones to fight back. Explore refreshed Dark Zones featuring weekly rotations, including a new PvE experience and a major PvP update across all modes. Plus, a new Incursion is coming later this season.
 
Packed with rotating Dark Zones, all-new Classified Assignments, a brand-new Season Pass, and an upcoming Incursion, Into the Dark is a season of intense risk, tactical choice, and high‑stakes extractions.
 
The Division 2: Into the Dark launches on June 16.

About The Division 2:
Tom Clancy's The Division 2 is a shooter RPG with a thrilling campaign fully playable in co-op and multiple PVP modes.

In The Division 2, save your country in Washington, DC, and in the Warlords of New York expansion, hunt down Aaron Keener, a former Agent who has taken control of New York.

#Ubisoft #TheDivision2

About Ubisoft:
Ubisoft is a creator of worlds, committed to enriching players’ lives with original and memorable entertainment experiences. Ubisoft’s global teams create and develop a deep and diverse portfolio of games, featuring brands such as Assassin’s Creed®, Brawlhalla®, For Honor®, Far Cry®, Tom Clancy’s Ghost Recon®, Just Dance®, Rabbids®, Tom Clancy’s Rainbow Six®, The Crew® and Tom Clancy’s The Division®. Through Ubisoft Connect, players can enjoy an ecosystem of services to enhance their gaming experience, get rewards and connect with friends across platforms. With Ubisoft+, the subscription service, they can access a growing catalog of more than 100 Ubisoft games and DLC. For the 2023-24 fiscal year, Ubisoft generated net bookings of €2.32 billion. To learn more, please visit: www.ubisoftgroup.com.

© 2024 Ubisoft Entertainment. All Rights Reserved. Ubisoft and the Ubisoft logo are registered trademarks in the US and/or other countries.
